title: ctenitis tonduzii
intro: Ctenitis tonduzii, also known as the Tonduz's fern or Tonde's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis tonduzii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, Ctenitis tonduzii is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used topically as a poultice or ointment to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
